description: Per-event attribute dictionary. For each event, lists the field-level attributes used by that event with type, sample, and tracking status. Grouped by event so the agent can query 'which attributes belong to the purchase event?' directly.

attributes.name: purchase_id
attributes.description: Unique identification of purchase/order in backend systems

attributes.name: purchase_status
attributes.description: Status of the purchase. "success" defined as placed order

attributes.name: purchase_source_type
attributes.description: Type of the source from where the purchase was done

attributes.name: purchase_source_name
attributes.description: Name of the source from where the purchase was done

attributes.name: voucher_code
attributes.description: Voucher used in this purchase

attributes.name: voucher_percentage
attributes.description: Percentage of the used voucher

attributes.name: voucher_value
attributes.description: Amount substracted by using a voucher

attributes.name: shipping_company
attributes.description: Delivery company

attributes.name: shipping_cost
attributes.description: Price of shipping

attributes.name: location
attributes.description: Full URL of the page where event occured

attributes.name: local_currency
attributes.description: Currency User selected when visiting site

attributes.name: domain
attributes.description: Domain of the website

attributes.name: language
attributes.description: Language of website as selected by user or default

attributes.name: product_list
attributes.description: List of all purchased products.

attributes.name: product_ids
attributes.description: List of all ids of all purchased products.

attributes.name: variant_list
attributes.description: List of all product variants, their quantities and other required properties

attributes.name: variant_ids
attributes.description: List of all ids of all product variants

attributes.name: total_quantity
attributes.description: Product quantity

attributes.name: total_price
attributes.description: Total price (paid by customer) in reference currency, for analytics purposes to calculate revenue, with TAX, delivery - listed price

attributes.name: total_price_without_tax
attributes.description: Total price (paid by customer) in reference currency, for analytics purposes to calculate revenue, without TAX (item price*quantity)+shiping

attributes.name: total_price_local_currency
attributes.description: Final price paid by a customer in local currency

attributes.name: timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of an event - if not tracked, timestamp of import/ingestion will be used

attributes.name: purchase_id
attributes.description: Unique identification of purchase/order in backend systems

attributes.name: purchase_status
attributes.description: Status of the purchase. "success" defined as placed order

attributes.name: purchase_source_type
attributes.description: Type of the source from where the purchase was done

attributes.name: purchase_source_name
attributes.description: Name of the source from where the purchase was done

attributes.name: product_id
attributes.description: ID of the product ("product" can be an umbrella for multiple variants)

attributes.name: variant_id
attributes.description: ID of the specific variant.(Most specific id with specific variant (including color, size, material)

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Human readable, most specific item name (including color, size, material if available).
attributes.sample: ASOS Tassel Loafers in Navy Faux Sued

attributes.name: brand
attributes.description: Brand of an item.

attributes.name: tags
attributes.description: Custom tags for describing most specific item (variant), e.g. "new", "sales", "teen", "man".

attributes.name: category_level_1
attributes.description: Top level category human readable name

attributes.name: category_level_2
attributes.description: 2nd level category human readable name

attributes.name: category_level_3
attributes.description: 3rd level category human readable name

attributes.name: categories_path
attributes.description: Categories hierarchy breadcrumbs

attributes.name: price
attributes.description: What customer pay for one unit item.

attributes.name: price_local_currency
attributes.description: What customer pay for one unit item, in currency selected by a customer.

attributes.name: discount_percentage
attributes.description: Percentage of discount per most specifit item unit (variant)

attributes.name: discount_value
attributes.description: Value of discount per most specific item unit (variant)

attributes.name: original_price
attributes.description: Most specific item (variant) list unit price in referrence currency

attributes.name: original_price_local_currency
attributes.description: Most specific item (variant) list unit price in currency selected by a customer

attributes.description: Full URL of the page where event occured

attributes.description: Currency User selected when visiting site

attributes.description: Domain of the website

attributes.name: total_price_without_tax
attributes.description: Total price (paid by customer) in reference currency, for analytics purposes to calculate revenue, without TAX (item price*quantity)+shiping

attributes.name: total_price_local_currency
attributes.description: Final price paid by a customer in local currency

attributes.name: timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of an event - if not tracked, timestamp of import/ingestion will be used

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Action performend during consent proces
attributes.sample: Values: accept - for possitive consent, reject 'for negative consent

attributes.name: category
attributes.description: This is ID of consent. Usually category expresses a name of consent, which you are giving

attributes.name: valid_until
attributes.description:
Multiple options:
"unlimited" - Consent event never lose its validity
<timestamp> - Unix timestamp of an expiration date

attributes.name: ip
attributes.description: Public IP address of visitor

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Full quotation of consent message that customer reacted to

attributes.description: Full URL of the page where event occured

attributes.description: Domain of the website

attributes.description: Timestamp of an event - if not tracked, timestamp of import/ingestion will be used

attributes.description: touchpoint / form name

attributes.description: Operation on basket contents (add | remove | empty)

attributes.description: Timestamp of an event - if not tracked, timestamp of import/ingestion will be used

attributes.name: button_type

attributes.description: Type of page where cart contents changed (product, homepage, category page, checkout)

attributes.name: product_id
attributes.description: ID of the product ("product" can be an umbrella for multiple variants)

attributes.name: variant_id
attributes.description: Use this one only in case when customer has both "products" and "variants" and has separate product page for each "variant". In this case implement only variant_id (do not implement product_id). Othervise do not implement this attribute (varian_id).

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Human readable item name on product page
attributes.sample: ASOS Tassel Loafers in Navy Faux Sued

attributes.name: brand
attributes.description: Brand of an item.

attributes.name: tags
attributes.description: Custom tags for describing item on product page, e.g. "new", "sales", "teen", "man".

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Action performend during double-opt in proces

attributes.name: email
attributes.description: Email address from user input in canonical form

attributes.name: source
attributes.description:
Multiple options:
crm - Manually created consent in APP. Possible just only application.
import - Imported consent from import wizard. Possible only from application.
public_api - Most likely tracking API, which uses only public token for authentification
private_api - API, which uses basic authentification
page - Tracked on a consent page

attributes.name: phone
attributes.description: Customer phone number, ideally in string format with the country code in the beginning

attributes.description: Full URL of the page where event occured

attributes.name: domain
attributes.description: Domain of the website

attributes.name: language
attributes.description: Language of website as selected by user or default

attributes.name: ip
attributes.description: Public IP address of visitor

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Full quotation of consent message that customer reacted to

attributes.name: consent_list
attributes.description: JSON array of given concents

attributes.name: timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of an event - if not tracked, timestamp of import/ingestion will be used

attributes.name: purchase_id
attributes.description: Unique identification of purchase/order in backend systems (if the double optin submission was done during purchase/checkout process)
